channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: ICE agents raid seafood store, detain U.S. military veteran
item.description: "I asked them [the agents] what documentation they were looking for, and they said it was a license or a passport.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, KTLA 5

item.title: A deadly flight out of Wichita has one of America's most historic aviation cities reeling
item.description: WICHITA, Kan. (AP) — When American Eagle Flight 5342 took off from Wichita, the Midwest city with a proud aviation history was glowing from a big moment. It had just hosted the next generation of Olympic hopefuls at the U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Colleges around the US cautiously navigate Trump's DEI crackdown
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — In Boston, Northeastern University renamed a program for underrepresented students, emphasizing “belonging” for all. In New Jersey, a session at Rutgers University catering to students from historically Black colleges had to be abruptly canceled. And around the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An air ambulance has crashed in Philadelphia. What to know about air medical transport
item.description: A medical transport jet carrying a child patient, her mother and four others slammed into a Philadelphia neighborhood and exploded in flames.
item.dc:creator: AUDREY McAVOY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Atlanta rethinks clearing homeless camps after a man is crushed inside his tent
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Atlanta leaders are reconsidering how they dismantle homeless camps after a man was crushed inside a tent as a bulldozer destroyed makeshift homes in preparation for Martin Luther King Jr. holiday events.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Illinois governor blocks pardoned Jan. 6 rioters from state jobs
item.description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker (D) said he would block pardoned Capitol insurrectionists from serving in local government positions, citing a state law ordinance, according to a Thursday letter obtained by The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Late-night CBP helicopter ride-along shows advanced tech used to apprehend migrants
item.description: Fox News took an exclusive nighttime helicopter ride over the border in El Paso, Texas, with U.S. Customs and Border Protection to view the day-to-day work that goes into protecting the border.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: North Carolina's ex-lieutenant governor dismisses lawsuit against CNN, has no plans to run again
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — North Carolina's former Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson on Friday withdrew his defamation lawsuit against CNN that challenged a report about him making explicit posts on a pornography website’s message board over a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: GARY D. ROBERTSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Arrest warrant issued for New York doctor indicted in Louisiana for prescribing abortion pill
item.description: An arrest warrant has been issued for a New York doctor indicted by a Louisiana grand jury for allegedly prescribing an abortion pill online to a pregnant minor.
item.dc:creator: Sara Cline And Geoff Mulvihill, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: It’s 'all hands on deck' as immigration enforcement ramps up in El Paso
item.description: EL PASO, Texas (Border Report) – The FBI and agents with the Drug Enforcement Administration are assisting federal partners who are conducting immigration enforcement operations in the El Paso area.
item.dc:creator: Julian Resendiz, Fox 5

item.title: 7-Eleven is giving away free Slurpees to celebrate the end of January
item.description: (KTLA) - January is finally coming to an end, and to celebrate people beating the “winter gloom,” 7-Eleven is giving away free Slurpees on Friday. Each customer can get only one free small Slurpee while supplies last.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump says helicopter in crash was flying too high
item.description: President Donald Trump on Friday asserted the military helicopter involved in a deadly midair collision near Washington, D.C., was "flying too high.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: Trump aid freeze disrupts global HIV/AIDS fight
item.description: A legacy bipartisan initiative to combat HIV and AIDS in Africa is collateral damage from President Donald Trump’s directive to halt all U.S. foreign assistance, despite efforts to exempt humanitarian assistance and lifesaving medication from being caught up in the three-month funding freeze.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, WGN 9

item.title: OnePlus 13 review: excellent, but not perfect
item.description: Over the years, OnePlus has made some memorable phones with unique features, like a pop-up selfie camera, McLaren editions, and super-fast wireless charging. This time around, they're making the OnePlus 13 the most water resistant phone I've ever tested.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: Congress authorized more flights at Reagan National despite warnings
item.description: Congress added more flights to Reagan National's schedule last year despite warnings from the airport.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego among most expensive cities to rent a one-bedroom apartment: report
item.description: The price of renting an apartment is on the rise, particularly in some major U.S. cities, including San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, Fox 5

item.title: Trump warns Canada, Mexico tariffs are coming on Saturday
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday said he plans to follow through on Saturday on his threat to impose 25 percent tariffs on goods from Mexico and Canada.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Top music acts announced for FireAid, a concert to support L.A. wildfire victims
item.description: The biggest names in pop, rock and country are coming together to raise funds for victims of the Palisades and Eaton wildfires and assist with the recovery.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, NewsNation

item.title: Manhunt tied to 'anarchist' vegan cult in Border Patrol agent killing: report
item.description: The suspected killers of U.S. Border Patrol agent David Maland were reportedly part of a vegan, "anarchist" cult whose members have been linked to a series of crimes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge extends court-monitoring agreement for children in Customs and Border Protection custody
item.description: McAllen, Texas (AP) — A federal judge extended a court agreement on Thursday ensuring safe and sanitary conditions for migrant children in federal custody a day after U.S. Customs and Border Protection was set to begin self-monitoring.
item.dc:creator: VALERIE GONZALEZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Olympian Nancy Kerrigan mourns loss of skating community members after DC plane crash
item.description: “Much like everyone here has been saying is not sure how to process it,” she told MSNBC while in tears on Thursday at the Boston Skating Club.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Engineering student among DC plane crash victims
item.description: DAYTON, Ohio (WDTN) -- Cedarville University is grieving one of its own after the devastating plane crash in Washington D.C. Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Emily Lewis, WFLA, NBC

item.title: MMA fighter praises Hitler, calls him a 'good guy' in podcast
item.description: UFC fighter Bryce Mitchell praised Adolf Hitler and denied the Holocaust happened in the first episode of his new podcast.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KTLA 5

item.title: Gabbard battles senators over Snowden, Syria in fiery hearing: 5 takeaways
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, President Trump’s pick to be the next director of national intelligence, endured a difficult hearing before the Senate Intelligence Committee on Thursday as lawmakers pressed her on her views on Edward Snowden, spying, Syria and Russia.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: DC crash ‘almost identical’ to 1949 collision: Aviation expert
item.description: “There was a prior accident at Washington National 75 years ago almost identical to what happened last night.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, KRON4

item.title: Reagan National Airport one of world's most complex airspaces
item.description: Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport (DCA) services both military helicopters and passenger planes every day.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KRON4

item.title: FBI wrestles with a spike in sexual misconduct claims and male-dominated culture
item.description: An investigation by AP revealed that the incidents ranged from sexual assault to agents paying for sex at massage parlors.
item.dc:creator: Jim Mustian, KRON4

item.title: First officer on deadly DC plane crash identified by father
item.description: RICHMOND HILL, Ga. (WSAV) — The family of one of the DC plane crash victims has been identified by his family. Nexstar affiliate WSAV confirmed through family that a Richmond Hill High School graduate was one of the 64 people who perished on the fatal American Airlines D.C. flight.
item.dc:creator: Dylan James, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Flu map: These states are now at CDC's highest activity level
item.description: The map of flu activity across the United States continues to darken, both figuratively and literally, as case numbers spike upward in most states, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC).
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Regional jet carrying 64, military helicopter on training flight collide near Reagan National Airport
item.description: A regional jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members collided with a military helicopter on Wednesday night as it approached Washington Reagan National Airport. The flight was en route from Wichita, Kan., to Washington, D.C., American Airlines said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Elvia Limon, WGN 9

item.title: Trump White House rescinds memo freezing federal money after widespread confusion
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump's budget office on Wednesday rescinded a memo freezing spending on federal loans and grants, less than two days after it sparked widespread confusion and legal challenges across the country.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, ZEKE MILLER and LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man who killed five people after a neighbor complained about his gunfire gets life in prison
item.description: COLDSPRING, Texas (AP) — A man accused of killing five people in Texas in 2023 after a neighbor complained that he was keeping a baby awake by firing a gun in his yard late at night pleaded guilty Wednesday to murder charges and will serve a life sentence without the possibility of parole, a prosecu
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4
